/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/StockChart_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/SettingsDialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/StockDataProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/AlphaVantageProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/FinnhubProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/PolygonProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/src/TwelveDataProvider.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StockChart.dir/build_exe/.qt/rcc/qrc_app_resources.cpp.o -o StockChart -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCharts.framework/Versions/A/QtCharts /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGLWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGLWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtOpenGL.framework/Versions/A/QtOpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
